family_name: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation — Shared decision-making documentation
population: People with relevant shared decision-making documentation history, findings and clinician decisions entered.
intended_setting: Partial for recording clinician-patient decisions; condition-specific options, evidence and UAE consent law remain unsupported.

evidence_statements.faithful_clinical_statement: This website is using a security service to protect itself from online attacks. The action you just performed triggered the security solution. evidence_statements.jurisdiction: United Kingdom professional standards; UAE consent and capacity law governs local use
